metadata.title: Amani Limousines — Premium Private Chauffeur Service in Paris
metadata.description: Luxury private chauffeur service in Paris. Airport transfers CDG, Orly, Le Bourget. Sedans, VIP vans, convoys. Available 24/7.

hero.tag: Premium private chauffeur service in Paris
hero.subtitle: Airport transfers, hourly hire, official delegations. Over 300 premium vehicles. Multilingual chauffeurs. Available 24/7.

disposition.title: Hourly hire
disposition.subtitle: Mise à disposition
disposition.desc: Your private chauffeur in Paris stays at your disposal for however long you need. Half-day, full day, multi-day — the vehicle and chauffeur adapt to your schedule in real time.

transfer.title: Private transfer
transfer.subtitle: Transfert privé
transfer.desc: Door-to-door transfer between any two addresses. Airports, train stations, hotels, meeting venues. The price is fixed in advance — no meter, no surprises.

meetgreet.title: Meet and Greet
meetgreet.subtitle: VIP welcome
meetgreet.desc: Personalised welcome at the arrivals area with a name board. Luggage assistance, escort to the vehicle. Fast Track option available at CDG and Orly.

convoy.title: Vehicle convoy
convoy.subtitle: Convoi de véhicules
convoy.desc: Coordination of multiple vehicles for delegations, diplomatic missions and large-scale events. Centralised dispatch, radio communication between drivers.

security.title: Close protection
security.subtitle: Sécurité rapprochée
security.desc: Secure transport with escort for public figures, diplomats and executives. Lead vehicles, follow cars, drivers trained in defensive driving.

excursion.title: Private excursion
excursion.subtitle: Excursion privée
excursion.desc: Versailles, Champagne, Normandy, Loire Valley, Giverny. Your chauffeur knows the routes and can arrange custom stops along the way. Culinary guide available.

longdistance.title: Long distance
longdistance.subtitle: Longue distance
longdistance.desc: Paris–Deauville, Paris–Brussels, Paris–Lyon, Paris–Côte d'Azur. Our sedans and VIP vans are fitted for long journeys: Wi-Fi, power outlets, workspace.

steps.title: Request your quote
steps.desc: Enter your itinerary online or call us. Instant quote, fixed price guaranteed from confirmation.

steps.title: Instant confirmation
steps.desc: You receive a confirmation by email and SMS with your chauffeur's name and photo.

steps.title: VIP pick-up
steps.desc: Your chauffeur arrives 15 minutes early. If your flight is delayed, they adapt automatically at no extra charge.

steps.title: Travel in comfort
steps.desc: Enjoy the journey in a premium vehicle. Wi-Fi, water, chargers — everything is included.

items.title: Guaranteed fixed price
items.desc: Your fare is confirmed at booking. No surcharges, no bad surprises regardless of traffic or journey length.

items.title: Elite chauffeurs
items.desc: All our chauffeurs are certified, trained in defensive driving and multilingual — French, English, Arabic, Mandarin.

items.title: Real-time flight tracking
items.desc: We monitor your flight in real time. If your plane is delayed, your chauffeur adapts automatically at no extra cost.

items.title: Renewed premium fleet
items.desc: Over 300 vehicles renewed every year — Mercedes, BMW, Sprinter. All less than 3 years old, inspected daily.

items.title: 30-minute response
items.desc: Our team replies to any quote request within 30 minutes, 24/7, by phone, email or WhatsApp.

items.title: Absolute discretion
items.desc: Total confidentiality for diplomatic, corporate and VIP clients. Our chauffeurs operate under the strictest non-disclosure.

items.name: James W.
items.text: Flawless service. Chauffeur on time, immaculate vehicle, and available outside regular hours. Highly recommended for all your professional transfers in Paris.

items.name: Sophie L.
items.text: I have used Amani Limousines for all my airport transfers for 3 years. Perfect punctuality, top-of-the-range vehicles, always courteous chauffeurs. A true 5-star service.

items.name: Mohammed A.
items.text: Outstanding coordination for an official delegation of 12 people. Perfect logistics, impeccable vehicle synchronisation. We will absolutely use their services again.

items.name: Claire M.
items.text: CDG–Paris transfer at 5am, the chauffeur was there and smiling. The flight tracking actually works — he already knew about the delay. Very professional, highly recommend.

items.q: How does the fixed price work?
items.a: Your price is calculated and confirmed at the time of booking, based on your route and chosen vehicle. It includes all taxes, tolls and parking. No surcharges or surprises.

items.q: What happens if my flight is delayed?
items.a: We monitor your flight in real time. If your flight is delayed, your chauffeur adapts automatically at no extra charge. You don't need to do anything — our team handles everything.

items.q: What types of vehicles do you offer?
items.a: Our fleet includes executive sedans (Mercedes E-Class, S-Class, BMW i7), luxury vans (Mercedes V-Class) and VIP minibuses (Mercedes Sprinter). All vehicles are under 3 years old.

items.q: Do you offer services for delegations?
items.a: Yes, we coordinate multi-vehicle convoys for official delegations, diplomatic missions and corporate events. Centralised dispatch, radio communication between drivers.
We cover Paris and the Île-de-France region, with transfers to and from all airports (CDG, Orly, Le Bourget). We also cover long distances: Deauville, Lyon, Brussels, Côte d'Azur and across Europe.
Via our online quote form, by phone on +33 6 62 02 73 44, by email at contact@amani-limousines.com, or via WhatsApp. Our team responds within 30 minutes, 24/7.

events.title: Transport for your
events.subtitle: VIP transport for Paris's most prestigious events

cta.title: Contact
cta.subtitle: Available 24/7 for bookings, custom quotes and delegation requests. Guaranteed response within 30 minutes.
